posts.text:
Wow man you got me. I changed my view on the topic. How did you know? Is it because I openly admitted in the first sentence of the post that I changed my view on the topic? Wow you really dunked on me here. I don’t know if I’ll be able to recover.


Vladimir Suvorov (@VladimirSuvor)

There's nothing wrong with this viewpoint. It's similar to my own. But a year or two ago, Matt Walsh was not only arguing the TOTAL OPPOSITE, but doing so sneeringly, declaring that those who wanted their kids to st

Reading Blood Meridian. I wonder if there will ever be an author like Cormac McCarthy again, or if we’ve seen the last of the truly great writers. Every sentence he composes is art, like a painting. You see and feel what he’s trying to convey. He wrestles with big things, the human condition, good and evil. He doesn’t give you answers but he leaves you with a lot to think about. An absolute master of his craft. Not the last, I hope, but I don’t know.

I Looked Into Why Terrorists Are Being Let Into Our Country. It's Worse Than You Think | Ep. 1750

open.spotify.com/episode/6qj…

I’m of the controversial opinion that we should not import this intentionally into our country


Dr. Maalouf ‏ (@realMaalouf)

“I killed 900 people, and raped 50 young girls and 200 women”

An Islamic State terrorist smiles as he proudly describes what he did to Yazidis and Christians.

Happy “International Day to Combat Islamophobia”!

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/realMaalouf/status/2033190890781470864#m

If we’re going to have a day set aside to recognize mythical phenomena then I’d prefer like Big Foot Day or something fun like that


Ontario Proud (@ontarioisproud)

#REPORT: The CN tower was lit with teal colours on Sunday night in honour of International Long COVID Awareness Day.





— https://nitter.net/ontarioisproud/status/2033573690042933674#m

The fact is that Charlie Kirk was murdered by a left wing militant. And that’s far from the only act of brutal violence by a leftist even just over the past year. 

In response, there hasn’t been any kind of major nationwide crackdown on leftist extremists and the organizations that fund and encourage them. 

There hasn’t been any concerted response of any kind. It just hasn’t happened. 

But don’t worry: Democrats will take power and do to us exactly what we didn’t have the focus or fortitude t

It won’t pass because he doesn’t want it to pass. They have the means to force it through but they refuse to. One of the worst betrayals by Republicans in my life, and there’s a very long list of them.


The Calvin Coolidge Project (@TheCalvinCooli1)

🚨Report: The U.S. Senate is preparing to vote on the SAVE America Act on Wednesday

However, there will be no talking filibuster





— https://nitter.net/TheCalvinCooli1/status/2032866913508876734#m

He was. He had diplomatic and organizational skills that a lot of us don’t have. I certainly don’t.


Mostly Peaceful Memes (@MostlyPeaceful)

Pretty clear that Charlie Kirk was the linchpin of the conservative movement



— https://nitter.net/MostlyPeaceful/status/2033541352122614217#m

The conservative commentariat now spends most of its time talking to itself about itself. It is increasingly divorced from the issues that impact actual Americans. It can’t even pretend to care anymore. I’m disgusted by the whole thing at this point. All I can say is that on my show we do researched deep dives every single day into the actual issues, including the stuff that the news cycle ignores. We will continue to do that. I’m not getting sucked into this black hole of bullshit. I didn’t sig
The past that California desperately wants you to forget
You can't win with these people
